name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Hunt for Congress Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

We are now less than 80 days out from Election Day, and thanks to the support of people like you Team Hunt is in a strong position to succeed in November. From our volunteers and interns to our advisory board members and donors, the many diverse members of Team Hunt are having a tremendous impact on our campaign. Thank you for the work you have done and continue to do to help us flip this district red in November.

I am happy to report that my wife Emily, my daughter Victoria, and I are now officially COVID free. I want to reiterate our appreciation for the outpouring of well wishes we received and take the moment to lift up those who have borne the brunt of this terrible virus. I ask that you continue to keep in mind the vulnerable members of our community who have been hit the hardest as well as our medical professionals and first responders who have been fighting the coronavirus on the front lines.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=ebea1c9f516a441097347c622f12c939&_e=PdCmeDwBPKFzUEKkItoL8Q0W-QbGiitXQ4vT1o4RYvYKWOtNpnXANt3U-Qusr63pjtx0spcgeYROxkmxIAtoZCIJ12g643JPaWpozvLDbXepM4KwiEbbTWK7aj0gRjqxQHdiC2kt7rpxQh_OHyZI9Ija6WvVfYhtQ3OTkZMzOzobV-VhKbglh3SWrOzAS-7Axk-wbPayUQolz3XcoI9F8DDFsSml0A10pqGQNJGXLFBRz2wNrQJvuzcscfgDL_Dd2bi2DIDNbas1DAC7usIekmZ4FjN2D_qxvFGEmWA2kTjtxyDbhdbQEPMW0NOYjzb0)

On Tuesday, I joined the great folks over at the OilField 360 podcast to discuss issues important to the residents of Texas' 7th District. We had a great time delving into the oil and gas industry and opportunities to advance this critical fixture of Houston's economy. You can find the full podcast episode [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=ebea1c9f516a441097347c622f12c939&_e=PdCmeDwBPKFzUEKkItoL8X6Ij3zAQjjgZbVaRMj74R4J8OumIlhq0d1rpSoy2FguCspwMZkw8x6_wRf6h9R_svk2DWbnehpaGggyMN70BX3e8pafDdY-HyP1cmLStbOwHwsN7glGV0tmWRRP2TXLnqyOxTFPBzrHB7D2R10MiEuxgRwgaws3dz4Qyza2snawCusd4gYfstNhIfz6nzSN5fqlNiszIJFBrHC_LxENVvEr3rQTke9Gido2IWgf4tvG8nDoYuGGnxzP1rcBkACbFQ%3D%3D).

On Wednesday, I was honored to received the endorsement of Hunters Creek Village Council Member Jay Carlton. The next Representative for the 7th District must prioritize the needs of our local communities, not the priorities of career politicians like Nancy Pelosi. I look forward to working with local leaders like Council Member Carlton to advocate for the residents of Congressional District 7 and bring positive change to Houston.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=ebea1c9f516a441097347c622f12c939&_e=PdCmeDwBPKFzUEKkItoL8Q0W-QbGiitXQ4vT1o4RYvYKWOtNpnXANt3U-Qusr63pWr8rV6freliW-juXvCZZH0WQ3hXwg2Tix1LeEKunTHu3o7v0nXza7HuSS22KD7WGOSfT1eBigedW2f4VqslccA2jGtLkWpU_EzW0YYTGBTQoJRgCCjjehsjD4ktFOb-0UzPFOebKIpn8NBoBJHFnvNsM1-jixMBmAcUHqOhuPwGjbVsdL4THdD_IlChS3WVCSr3kU2udOvZYV2ioJN4pzfNN3nIj72bH8injvKYU9guDqaGBrlAq_MLtspqqr1t4)

_In case you missed it_ , on Tuesday, Vice President Joe Biden chose Kamala Harris as his running mate. I am disappointed that Lizzie Fletcher has openly embraced Senator Harris given her record of supporting the _Green New Deal_ and sponsoring legislation that would be devastating to the Texas energy industry. You can find my full statement on the matter [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=ebea1c9f516a441097347c622f12c939&_e=PdCmeDwBPKFzUEKkItoL8eIQFpjEOrmHzgjSFVfJ-z4qeK9co1Rk7KnBCAxxm4l4eZwo09kwEji7FTvh4fsWivEDavCk3nAAJPxjqIH-vw7UnRs4XlwicWcXzcsZ1nLA1FMLFsJNE3mj5zgJHVtUdIOd_-kBQBeH_rJJXsoKLBt0vlj2P-VEtHPMPTGxuJkmC9ivJayQlpky2nLFPdnMYagY8t0Xw0kQB_plGMat0--pkmNZeen8H49b2yTShH2vWxSHAEeRqFixAhZsMz88BLOp97NgQjViG3i2-JgAZ_spgNpiMUc6CFXqLscfotPEolqqFXn5CHzSJWPQohNfEx6vAo2CGv7OSDoYK9Sha1rh1CALTIqzW_AzFWalnURi).

Thank you for choosing to be on Team Hunt, this mission wouldn't be possible without your engagement and support.

Sincerely,
Wesley

P.S. I am happy to see so many Hunt for Congress yard signs in front of houses throughout the district. If you would like a yard sign, please reach out and Team Hunt will gladly deliver one to you as soon as possible.

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=ebea1c9f516a441097347c622f12c939&_e=PdCmeDwBPKFzUEKkItoL8UnCXtj5i_AvD_dd5iAXtX8TqiX1Dzk7FWOMwZHIaPtYm_rr7FejcaO0nmveQjSBac_VGJFWdosuza3O21I2tysgeaKEjZCsqjoUSlhheu47-UykNjc7UGdVvP2341Wa6JwM5fq14hbWStAGgBCsFHME7UqAXAKtW_zX5T60cYjlnX3Oi5ss1nlhu2XtRnCGPQ6CCWfcyRB7gOU8LTRq0PfpAvEUUAY_A9TcLItlh2WnLKyXGZIGOVCxKcHMtj0YKMOvvpSmpEZdaQb0BMnmwLc%3D)****
---

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_s=ebea1c9f516a441097347c622f12c939&_t=hRlirek03wFmAjo6wb0jPqJW12wS66oYF932IojIbMmlXjHJH3gohb0Y9y5QuA6yA_TrSAkEX2N8DZPoccjux0emuFJm4wqlE7kzovf4ELZ5zQc_KloaFCPgyPIssNeJqO0YWfHe7hXmiqyQHU1atK_v9JyU7AhiPiFunyejLj8%3D).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Future=20Generations?=
subject: Tell Mitch to Reconvene the Senate and Solve USPS Crisis Now!
body:
Trump is attacking our democracy again. | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=18304364c6&e=66979298f9)
---
| | |
## [_SAVE THE U.S. POSTAL SERVICE_](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=f7dffc8cbd&e=66979298f9)
---
|
#### **Tell Mitch it's time for the Senate to convene!**
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=f6f5709bc0&e=66979298f9)
---
|
---
| Trump is attacking our democracy again. This time he's openly stated that he will defund the United States Postal Service(USPS) because he doesn't support Mail-In voting for the 2020 Presidential Election.
### Don't let Donald Trump and Louis DeJoy dismantle the U.S. Postal Service and destroy our democracy!
The U.S. Postal Service is integrated into the fabric of our lives in a multitude of ways—including being a literal lifeline for many in the midst of the pandemic. Amid a global pandemic, millions more Americans need to rely on it to safely cast their ballot this November! **We're not going to let Donald Trump undermine our democracy. We can't, and we won't. But it's going to take all of us coming together to make noise and fight back.** [**Join us in the fight by chipping in $7 per month until November.**](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=c1bfef63f2&e=66979298f9)
---
| [ADD YOUR NAME AND TELL MITCH TO ACT](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=55210fdfd8&e=66979298f9 "ADD YOUR NAME AND TELL MITCH TO ACT")
---
| [GIVE $7 TO DEFEND USPS](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=12a224879f&e=66979298f9 "GIVE $7 TO DEFEND USPS")
---
|
---
| Of course Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell (R) is sitting on his hands and has not called the Senate to convene! Our democracy, our constitutional right to vote cannot wait! The Trump Administration is opposed to mail-in ballots because he is working overtime to suppress the vote of some of our most vulnerable communities. Trump is playing loosely with the livelihoods of many who depend on the USPS to deliver lifesaving medications, Social Security checks, and serving rural communities who depend on one of America's most valued social services. Postmaster General, Louis DeJoy, will appear before Congress to address his complicity in violating the People's right to vote and bending the knee to the corruption of the Trump Administration.

_It is imperative that the Senate convene as soon as possible to demand an investigation into the United States Postal Service(USPS) Crisis, approve more funding for the Postal Service, ensure that they are not in violation of the “Delivering for America Act,” signed on January 1, 2020, and demand the Postmaster General Louis DeJoy to appear before Congress to address his complicity in violating the People's right to vote and bending the knee to the blatant corruption of the Trump Administration._
---
| [DEMAND MITCH RECONVENE THE SENATE](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=ccca8a2ed6&e=66979298f9 "DEMAND MITCH RECONVENE THE SENATE")
---
| [GIVE $7 TO DEFEND OUR DEMOCRACY](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=6534092bd4&e=66979298f9 "GIVE $7 TO DEFEND OUR DEMOCRACY")
---
|
---
| Thank you,

Team Future Generations
#FORTHEFUTURE
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=44bad77283&e=66979298f9)
---
| | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=97ddbcd355&e=66979298f9)
---
| | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=ecd383c995&e=66979298f9)
---
| | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=87015188cf&e=66979298f9)
---
|

**Our mailing address is:**
Future Generations PACPO Box 1861Olympia, WA 98507-2394
[Add us to your address book](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/vcard?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9c2d36475c)

Want to change how you receive these emails?

You can [update your preferences](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/profile?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9c2d36475c&e=66979298f9) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9c2d36475c&e=66979298f9&c=9f3575613f).

name: Team Joe
subject: Can you attend a Convention virtual watch party?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
The Democratic National Convention starts tomorrow. Watch from your couch with your family at one of our thousands of virtual watch parties happening >> |
---
Peter -- are you ready to see Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and more at this week's Convention?

The Convention won't just be about who's on stage. It's about the future of America. With so much at stake, it's crucial that everyone hears about Joe and Kamala's vision to unite our country.

**Let us know if you 'll be joining your community at a virtual Convention watch party in your area by RSVPing now. Parties officially kick off tomorrow:** | | **WHAT: **Pennsylvania Convention Watch Party: Day 4
**WHEN:** Thursday, August 20th, 2020
**TIME:** 9:00 pm EDT
**WHERE:** Online!
---
| [**RSVP NOW »**](https://www.mobilize.us/2020victory/event/303393/?source=JB_EM_EV_2020.08.16_B8_attendparty-2_X__F1_S1_C1__bg&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_EV_2020.08.16_B8_attendparty-2_X__F1_S1_C1__bg)
---
You don't want to miss any of the fun -- and don't forget about the popcorn!

Team Joe

P.S. If you can't attend watch parties next week but still want to make sure we head into the next 79 days with enough resources to take on Donald Trump, please consider chipping in today:
[DONATE](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_EV_2020.08.16_B8_attendparty-2_X__F1_S1_C1__bg&amount=25&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_EV_2020.08.16_B8_attendparty-2_X__F1_S1_C1__bg")
---
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b419/1cd0ac28/1655b7ee4/357e53f4/4182139093/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b419/1cd0ac28/1655b7ee4/357e53f2/4182139093/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b419/1cd0ac28/1655b7ee4/357e53f0/4182139093/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b419/1cd0ac28/1655b7ee4/357e53ee/4182139093/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b419/1cd0ac28/1655b7ee4/357e53ed/4182139093/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b419/1cd0ac28/1655b7ee4/357e53eb/4182139093/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b419/1cd0ac28/1655b7ee4/357e53e9/4182139093/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b419/1cd0ac28/1655b7ee4/357e53e7/4182139093/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b419/1cd0ac28/1655b7ee4/357e53e5/4182139093/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b419/1cd0ac28/1655b7ee4/357e53e2/4182139093/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b419/1cd0ac28/1655b7ee4/357e53e9/4182139093/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b419/1cd0ac28/1655b7ee4/357e53e0/4182139093/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b419/1cd0ac28/1655b7ee4/357e53e7/4182139093/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b419/1cd0ac28/1655b7ee4/357e53de/4182139093/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: Corky Messner
subject: 🗳️ Have you requested your absentee ballot yet?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e5869ed3e03e1902/43ffeeea6c9c74cec3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Vote Absentee by Mail - Click or Tap to Get Started!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e5869ed3e03e1902/46dc664ec5a2a28ec3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter,
The clock is running down with only 22 days remaining until my crucial September 8th primary.
There will certainly be some difficult challenges to face on election day to ensure proper social distancing and safety of voters. But did you know that you don't even need to step foot in a polling place to make your vote count? Every New Hampshire resident can vote absentee by mail this year!

My team has made it easier than ever to get all the info you need. **[Click or tap here to visit my campaign's election center, where you can learn about important dates and request your absentee ballot!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e5869ed3e03e1902/12514b21e33a8890c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** [Messner Election Center - Click or Tap!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e5869ed3e03e1902/50f2549b19feae7dc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, as the only Republican who can defeat D.C. Jeanne Shaheen, this primary election is crucial to setting my campaign up for success on November 3rd.

And now that all Granite Staters can vote absentee by mail, it's imperative that we have a strong showing.

THANK YOU again for standing with me for a bold, unapologetic conservative agenda that will move our great nation forward.
\- Corky | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e5869ed3e03e1902/1dbc938864a16079c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e5869ed3e03e1902/ad9d7af057bc4ccbc3d6b838967d376c/33153)

name: Greg Stanton
subject: Democracy Dies Without The Right To Vote—Help Us Defend It
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
**[Will you sign on to this petition calling on the Voting Rights Act to be restored, protecting the rights of all Americans to vote?](https://act.myngp.com/el/ysanmdCiqaRz_4sKFEqsJMPeydkDlVtC_Zpqhj1Xnq0=/WoAZGc30NTQhh1johgMsetBITcYFcxBwrPV8zJWEOIs=)**

Long wait times at the polls, lost ballots, or attacks on US Postal Service funding are threats to constitutional voting rights encouraged by the Trump administration and Republican controlled state legislatures.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ysanmdCiqaRz_4sKFEqsJMPeydkDlVtC_Zpqhj1Xnq0=/peJHdhoA3H8vcU-zCQUAyZDQJTpW2w3oF2_oUqMgPd4=)

We can't let the other side continue to suppress voters who do not agree with them.

**[I hope you'll consider signing this petition, and chipping in to help candidates like me flip as many states blue in November as possible!](https://act.myngp.com/el/ysanmdCiqaRz_4sKFEqsJMPeydkDlVtC_Zpqhj1Xnq0=/WoAZGc30NTQhh1johgMsetBITcYFcxBwrPV8zJWEOIs=)**

Thank you for your support,

\-- _Greg_

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Tomorrow is Election Day
body:
I would be honored to have your vote.
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Friend,
Tomorrow is the election. We have been working towards this day for months.
I would be honored to have your vote tomorrow.
I have been endorsed by Senator Rand Paul, the Tea Party Express, the Tea Party Patriots, Republican Liberty Caucus, Sheriff Bobby Schultz, Commissioner Gayward Hendry, and more local leaders than any other candidate in this race.
Why?
Because I am running to be your pro-Trump, pro-gun, pro-life and pro-freedom Congresswoman.
---
|
---
| We have the momentum leading into election day, but we cannot let up now.
While my opponents have been busy slinging mud and trying to buy your vote, we've been staying focused on the issues that matter and working to earn your vote.
So if you are like me and are more concerned with stopping The Squad and saving our nation from socialism, then join Team Kat and vote for me on August 18th.
If you have any questions or would like to talk with me directly, please feel free to call or text me on my personal cell phone - (352) 359-5070. I look forward to hearing from you.
Thank you for your consideration.
---
|
---
|
Kat Cammack Constitutional conservative candidate for Congress, FL-03

# **FROM THE TEAM**
Because John's top priority is leading the state's fight against COVID-19, we need your help to get the message out. We will be sending regular updates from the campaign. Please consider sharing this email with friends and family. And stay safe: wear a mask in public settings. Physically distance. Stay vigilant.

* **DE 'S STATE PRIMARY ELECTION IS LESS THAN ONE MONTH AWAY.**
* John signed legislation this year that allows Delawareans to **vote by mail** \-- a safe alternative to practice their fundamental right to vote.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Re: Your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56027187:WHQBzF-qN:m:1:2247059263:36788726440454FBD037E2F8BA976A64:r)
---

Peter,

Like you, my team and I are having to adapt to the present reality of things, which includes altering campaign related activities, fundraising events, and having our primary election date postponed.

With the absence of campaign rallies, door-knocking, and in-person voter outreach efforts, now more than ever it's important to activate our online support community.

**[That's why today I'm asking you- as one of the most valued members of the American conservative movement - to personally endorse my re-election campaign.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56027187:WHQBzF-qN:m:1:2247059263:36788726440454FBD037E2F8BA976A64:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56027187:WHQBzF-qN:m:1:2247059263:36788726440454FBD037E2F8BA976A64:r)
As a front-line Republican and steadfast ally of President Trump, Democrats have long targeted me for electoral defeat in November's election. They don't like debating with me with regard to important legislation in the House; and **they cannot stand how we're helping the American public come to the realization that Democratic leadership in Congress is more focused on partisanship than getting things done for the American people**.

So, if you agree with me that:
1. **We need to secure the southern border**
2. **We should defund sanctuary cities**
3. **All life is sacred and should be protected at all costs**

**[Please consider endorsing my campaign for re-election today!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56027187:WHQBzF-qN:m:1:2247059263:36788726440454FBD037E2F8BA976A64:r)**

**[Your endorsement today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56027187:WHQBzF-qN:m:1:2247059263:36788726440454FBD037E2F8BA976A64:r)** will serve me well as my team and I continue to implement President Trump's America Agenda.

For liberty,
Jim Jordan

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56027187:WHQBzF-qN:m:1:2247059263:36788726440454FBD037E2F8BA976A64:r)

_We'd hate to see you go but if you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWHQBzF-qN)****_

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: I'm with Team Biden-Harris
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4dc524f3097a/im-with-team-biden-harris?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Last week, the Biden campaign announced that Senator Kamala Harris would be joining him at the top of our Democratic ticket this November. This historic decision has me even more excited to get to Congress.

**Senator Harris will make history in 2021 when she is sworn in as Vice President, and I plan to be right there in Washington with her.** She'll be the first woman, first African-American, and first Asian-American to win the Vice Presidency, and I can't wait to work with her to fight for our shared values.

[Can you chip in with a donation to our campaign to make sure we send Joe Biden and Kamala Harris a partner from IL-16?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=b10facf2d2&e=140a9b81e7)

As Democrats, we need to be united like never before for this election cycle. Our Party has a tremendous slate of candidates up and down the ballot, and I am extremely proud to be among them.

This week, we'll all come together virtually for the Democratic National Convention to get fired up about electing Democrats this November.**It's time to elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, defeat Trump, and strengthen our majority in the House. **

[Join us by making a donation to our campaign](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=38d9148991&e=140a9b81e7).

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

name: MJ Hegar
subject: The record
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
A recent poll found Sen. Cornyn ahead by just one point in this race.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e29/7f51f7bc/430ffb71/4ef7e0b3/3049561378/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

I got into this race because I didn't see our state's so-called leaders like Sen. Cornyn working for the people he's supposed to represent. As a working mom and combat veteran, I understand the struggles working families across Texas deal with every day -- and we know Sen. Cornyn isn't fighting for us.

**[I'm going to get into Sen. Cornyn's record, but if you're already with me, will you make a donation now to help me beat him and flip the Senate this November?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e29/7f51f7bc/430ffb71/4ef7e0b2/3049561378/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200817.1nd__1925__&amount=10")**

When Sen. Cornyn voted 20 times to repeal the Affordable Care Act -- and even now in a pandemic stands by as his allies work to gut the law in court -- he showed us he's working for big insurance companies, not for Texans.

When Sen. Cornyn accepted a large donation from the NRA shortly after a deadly mass shooting in our state, then refused to take even modest action on gun violence, he showed us he's working for the gun lobby, not for Texans.

When Sen. Cornyn watered down his own drug pricing legislation after taking in numerous huge donations from pharmaceutical companies' corporate PACs, he showed us he's working for Big Pharma, not for Texans.

It's no wonder a recent poll found Sen. Cornyn ahead by just one point in this race. He's beatable -- but he's seen the numbers too, and he's calling in big favors from friends like the Koch network.

**I need your help to fight back and keep our momentum going. Please pitch in today to help us do it, if you 're able.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Cornyn working for the people he's supposed to represent. As a working mom and combat veteran, I understand the struggles working families across Texas deal with every day -- and we know Sen. Cornyn isn't fighting for us. "" When Sen. Cornyn voted 20 times to repeal the Affordable Care Act -- and even now in a pandemic stands by as his allies work to gut the law in court -- he showed us he's working for big insurance companies, not for Texans. When Sen. Cornyn accepted a large donation from the NRA shortly after a deadly mass shooting in our state, then refused to take even modest action on gun violence, he showed us he's working for the gun lobby, not for Texans. When Sen. Cornyn watered down his own drug pricing legislation after taking in numerous huge donations from pharmaceutical companies' corporate PACs, he showed us he's working for Big Pharma, not for Texans. It's no wonder a recent poll found Sen. Cornyn ahead by just one point in this race. He's beatable -- but he's seen the numbers too, and he's calling in big favors from friends like the Koch network. name: Joseph R. Biden Jr.
subject: Please donate $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
The weight of this moment, and of the faith you are entrusting in me, is still very real. |
---
Peter --

Today, the Democratic National Convention begins. And while it's not the convention we'd originally envisioned, I have to be honest: the weight of this moment, and of the faith you are entrusting in me, is still very real. This will be a tremendous opportunity to share our vision with the whole country.

Over the next four days, you will hear from people across the country -- elected officials, community leaders, and more -- about why they're committed to electing Democrats up and down the ballot. Kamala Harris will accept your nomination to become your Vice President. And I will accept your nomination for President of the United States.

Then, as soon as the convention ends on Thursday, we enter the final phase of this battle for the soul of the nation. The final months of this campaign won't be easy, and we need to be prepared.

**That 's why today I'm announcing our ambitious goal to raise $25 million online over the next four days. This team hasn't let me down yet, and I know we can reach that goal -- but it's a goal we can only reach together.**

[So, Peter, can you chip in $5 right now to help hit our goal before the Democratic National Convention concludes on Thursday? Anything you can give will make a real difference to elect me, Kamala, and Democrats across the country.](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B1_jrb-beforeconv_X__F1_S2_C2__ac_T2&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B1_jrb-beforeconv_X__F1_S2_C2__ac_T2") _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Click here to express donate $5 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B1_jrb-beforeconv_X__F1_S2_C2__ac_T2&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B1_jrb-beforeconv_X__F1_S2_C2__ac_T2&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $100 >>](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B1_jrb-beforeconv_X__F1_S2_C2__ac_T2&amount=100&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B1_jrb-beforeconv_X__F1_S2_C2__ac_T2&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $250 >>](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B1_jrb-beforeconv_X__F1_S2_C2__ac_T2&amount=250&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B1_jrb-beforeconv_X__F1_S2_C2__ac_T2&express_lane=true")

[Click here to donate another amount >>](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B1_jrb-beforeconv_X__F1_S2_C2__ac_T2&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B1_jrb-beforeconv_X__F1_S2_C2__ac_T2")** Peter, since I named Kamala Harris as my running mate last week, the energy for this campaign has been electric.

I'm so grateful to every person who is a part of this team -- whether you joined us last week, last month, or last year. I know that, together, we are going to unite the country and defeat Donald Trump on Election Day.

But we still have more work to do before then, Peter. I don't like to ask for your hard-earned dollars, but this is a grassroots campaign, and we rely on grassroots supporters like you to power it.

**So, Peter, can I count on you to help reach our $25 million convention goal?**

[Make your first donation of $5 or whatever you can afford today.](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B1_jrb-beforeconv_X__F1_S2_C2__ac_T2&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.17_B1_jrb-beforeconv_X__F1_S2_C2__ac_T2")

Thank you,

Joe
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b42c/1cd0ac28/1668a376a/357e5cd7/1522771003/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b42c/1cd0ac28/1668a376a/357e5cd6/1522771003/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b42c/1cd0ac28/1668a376a/357e5cd5/1522771003/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b42c/1cd0ac28/1668a376a/357e5cd4/1522771003/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b42c/1cd0ac28/1668a376a/357e5cd3/1522771003/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b42c/1cd0ac28/1668a376a/357e5cd2/1522771003/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b42c/1cd0ac28/1668a376a/357e5cd1/1522771003/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b42c/1cd0ac28/1668a376a/357e5cd0/1522771003/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b42c/1cd0ac28/1668a376a/357e5ccf/1522771003/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b42c/1cd0ac28/1668a376a/357e5cce/1522771003/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b42c/1cd0ac28/1668a376a/357e5cd1/1522771003/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b42c/1cd0ac28/1668a376a/357e5ccd/1522771003/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b42c/1cd0ac28/1668a376a/357e5cd0/1522771003/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b42c/1cd0ac28/1668a376a/357e5ccc/1522771003/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

clean_body: The weight of this moment, and of the faith you are entrusting in me, is still very real. | Peter -- Today, the Democratic National Convention begins. And while it's not the convention we'd originally envisioned, I have to be honest: the weight of this moment, and of the faith you are entrusting in me, is still very real. This will be a tremendous opportunity to share our vision with the whole country. Over the next four days, you will hear from people across the country -- elected officials, community leaders, and more -- about why they're committed to electing Democrats up and down the ballot. Kamala Harris will accept your nomination to become your Vice President. And I will accept your nomination for President of the United States. Then, as soon as the convention ends on Thursday, we enter the final phase of this battle for the soul of the nation. The final months of this campaign won't be easy, and we need to be prepared. That 's why today I'm announcing our ambitious goal to raise $25 million online over the next four days. This team hasn't let me down yet, and I know we can reach that goal -- but it's a goal we can only reach together. "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" "" Peter, since I named Kamala Harris as my running mate last week, the energy for this campaign has been electric. I'm so grateful to every person who is a part of this team -- whether you joined us last week, last month, or last year. I know that, together, we are going to unite the country and defeat Donald Trump on Election Day. But we still have more work to do before then, Peter. I don't like to ask for your hard-earned dollars, but this is a grassroots campaign, and we rely on grassroots supporters like you to power it. So, Peter, can I count on you to help reach our $25 million convention goal? "" Thank you, Joe | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: Sandy Smith
subject: Hey Fake News media - ALL LIVES MATTER!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g5PxkD2Wa3Nxmng&b=jFLwO8iZfRl4dWrffeqOuw)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. **

I'm a mother, and because of that I always want to protect our families. In fact, to me, ALL LIVES MATTER! It frustrates me that the Fake News media only reports one type of death and not other types, for political reasons.
I keep saying "All lives matter", because if you treat every human being equally and value them as fellow children of God, then you'd be amazed at how many problems you can resolve.
We MUST value everyone equally. Why can't the Fake News media and their Democrat allies see that???
That is why I am so saddened by the murder of 5-year-old Cannon Hinnant, here in my own district:
_A North Carolina man faces a first-degree murder charge in the shooting death of a 5-year-old boy who, according to local media reports, was riding a bike in his neighborhood. _
_Police arrested Darius Sessoms, 25, on Monday after a brief search. The child, identified as Cannon Hinnant, was shot Sunday evening in Wilson, North Carolina, according to police. He was taken to a local hospital, where he later died. _
_"The Wilson Police Department sends its sincerest condolences and prayers to the family of Cannon during this tragic time," WPD said in a news release._
_WRAL-TV in North Carolina reported witnesses told police Cannon was riding his bike outside his father's home when he was shot in the head. WRAL reported Cannon's funeral was on Thursday. _
**_Cannon Hinnant was 5 years old, murdered. Where is his horse drawn carriage and golden casket? He was a purely innocent child! _**
**_Why won't the Fake News media talk about his death? SAY HIS NAME!_**
Darius Sessoms should fry for what he did! Why is the Fake News media protecting him? Because they actually think that some lives matter more than others- and that is propaganda for prejudice.
**_Yet the national media is silent on his murder. There will be no justice for Cannon, it seems. No national movement for him._**
**_Nancy Pelosi won't be kneeling at a press conference, unlike for George Floyd. _**
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g5PxkD2Wa3Nxmng&b=jFLwO8iZfRl4dWrffeqOuw)
---
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g5PxkD2Wa3Nxmng&b=jFLwO8iZfRl4dWrffeqOuw)
---

**_We just got lectured by the far Left and the Fake News media for 2 months about how "Black Lives Matter". They burned black-owned businesses, killed black people (including children), and destroyed black communities. _**

Now they will say nothing about this innocent 5 year old's death because it doesn't fit their narrative. But I can mourn all those who are murdered, because to me, ALL LIVES MATTER!

We must hold the Fake News media to account. They are not willing or able to tell the truth. That means you and I MUST tell the truth!

_The Left wants to play God and tell us which lives matter more than others. Which deserve to live and which deserve to die._

**That's not right! They shouldn't care where you live or your creed or race. We are all God's children and Americans- and we need to see each other equally!**

__Can you imagine if the radical Democrats took power? Do you want your family to be at the mercy of a party and a terrorist movement (Antifa) that wishes bad things for you and your family?__

[If that isn't YOUR vision for America, I need your help to change Congress and evict Pelosi!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g5PxkD2Wa3Nxmng&b=jFLwO8iZfRl4dWrffeqOuw) Unlike Pelosi, unlike Butterfield, I will TELL THE TRUTH!

**_It's time to protect the innocent and punish the guilty- and restore order to our land!_**

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g5PxkD2Wa3Nxmng&b=jFLwO8iZfRl4dWrffeqOuw), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

G.K. Butterfield is a Swampy radical, not a patriot, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g5PxkD2Wa3Nxmng&b=jFLwO8iZfRl4dWrffeqOuw). Our country needs fighters like you and me. Let's stand up now, before it's too late!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g5PxkD2Wa3Nxmng&b=jFLwO8iZfRl4dWrffeqOuw)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g5PxkD2Wa3Nxmng&b=jFLwO8iZfRl4dWrffeqOuw)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g5PxkD2Wa3Nxmng&b=jFLwO8iZfRl4dWrffeqOuw) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzsTGzsrIyc) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzsTGzsrIyc)

name: Josh Hicks
subject: 3 years ago...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
When white nationalists walked with pride through Charlottesville with hatred in their hearts our country was put on notice that far-rightwing extremism was far too comfortable in our nation. Three years later, as I reflect on the current state of our nation, I am inspired by the unified calls for racial justice across the country and hopeful that we can build a better tomorrow.

|
---
| | Friends, In August 2017, our nation watched as white supremacists took over Charlottesville, Virginia, to protest the removal of a statue commemorating Confederate general Robert E. Lee. A few days later, the Lexington City Council was debating the removal of Confederate statues downtown. **I stood up, as a concerned citizen and former Marine, to share my thoughts: the men on those monuments were traitorous insurrectionists who sought to subjugate an entire race of people because of the color of their skin. We don’t keep statues to those people.** When white nationalists walked with pride through Charlottesville, it was a painful reminder that extremism and hate are still alive in our communities. [_**Click here to see the full video of my statements in front of the Lexington City Council.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18725638/237835326/233318059?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTE5NmM0Yi1iOWUwLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LvCtx5BeAaJ2C5uVNrpiG4zILIsle1DJPQFZZ97QpbM=&emci=d3b9bd08-9de0-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=91196c4b-b9e0-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=15601662) Those statues memorialize the very enemies that, as a Marine, I swore an oath to protect our country against — they were domestic enemies of the United States. They also represent America’s centuries-long history of deep injustice toward Black people in our communities. **Three years later, as I reflect on the current state of our nation, it is more apparent than ever that there is a tremendous amount of work still to be done in the fight for equality. But I am also inspired by the renewed calls for racial justice across the country, and hopeful that together we can create real change.** It’s up to all of us — you and me — to stand up for what’s right. That’s what I hope to do for this district in Washington. Thank you, Josh | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18725639/237835327/-1082575601?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTE5NmM0Yi1iOWUwLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LvCtx5BeAaJ2C5uVNrpiG4zILIsle1DJPQFZZ97QpbM=&emci=d3b9bd08-9de0-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=91196c4b-b9e0-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=15601662) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18725640/237835328/209776233?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTE5NmM0Yi1iOWUwLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LvCtx5BeAaJ2C5uVNrpiG4zILIsle1DJPQFZZ97QpbM=&emci=d3b9bd08-9de0-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=91196c4b-b9e0-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=15601662)

clean_body: When white nationalists walked with pride through Charlottesville with hatred in their hearts our country was put on notice that far-rightwing extremism was far too comfortable in our nation. Three years later, as I reflect on the current state of our nation, I am inspired by the unified calls for racial justice across the country and hopeful that we can build a better tomorrow. | | | Friends, In August 2017, our nation watched as white supremacists took over Charlottesville, Virginia, to protest the removal of a statue commemorating Confederate general Robert E. Lee. A few days later, the Lexington City Council was debating the removal of Confederate statues downtown. I stood up, as a concerned citizen and former Marine, to share my thoughts: the men on those monuments were traitorous insurrectionists who sought to subjugate an entire race of people because of the color of their skin. We don’t keep statues to those people. When white nationalists walked with pride through Charlottesville, it was a painful reminder that extremism and hate are still alive in our communities. Those statues memorialize the very enemies that, as a Marine, I swore an oath to protect our country against — they were domestic enemies of the United States. They also represent America’s centuries-long history of deep injustice toward Black people in our communities. Three years later, as I reflect on the current state of our nation, it is more apparent than ever that there is a tremendous amount of work still to be done in the fight for equality. But I am also inspired by the renewed calls for racial justice across the country, and hopeful that together we can create real change. It’s up to all of us — you and me — to stand up for what’s right. That’s what I hope to do for this district in Washington. Thank you, Josh | | | Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress Josh Hicks for Congress PO Box 1214 Lexington, KY 40588 United States Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney. He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. = | | = | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Mary & the TNDP Team
subject: Day 1 Convention | Looking Forward to the Week Ahead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/tndp%20isaac%20300%20px.png]Dear Peter,
HAPPY DAY ONE OF #DEMCONVENTION WEEK!
Today, during our delegation breakfast, we heard from Democratic leaders local and national speaking in one voice. They included state Sen. Raumesh Akbari, Chair of the Tennessee Black Caucus; U.S. Congressman Hakeem Jeffries, Chair of the Democratic Caucus; and U.S. Congresswoman Maxine Waters, Chairwoman of the House Banking Committee. Democrats were unified, resolving to save public schools and the Postal Service, to protect the environment and the rule of law, to expand Medicaid and voting rights.
Building on the success of today's event, Democrats from across the state and country will join the Tennessee delegation at virtual events throughout the week. Join us for breakfast every day, celebrate the 19th amendment with us on Tuesday, and hear from national leaders like AG Eric Holder and Andrew Yang.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/DNC%20BREAKFASTS%20%281%29.png]
DELEGATION BREAKFASTS: Tuesday, 8/18 - 8/20, 8:30-10:00 AM CT
Join Chair Mary Mancini and the Tennessee Delegation each morning for breakfast featuring nationally known Democratic leaders including Attorney General Eric Holder, Senators Heidi Heitkamp and Carol Moseley Braun, and presidential candidate Andrew Yang to name just a few. Tickets are $25 per breakfast or all four for $75.
Purchase Tickets! [https://tndp.org/2020-dnc-breakfasts/] | Facebook Event [https://www.facebook.com/events/217274179727923/]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/ratified-facebook-post.png]
RATIFIED! A 19TH AMENDMENT CELEBRATION - Tuesday, 8/18, 6:00 - 8:00 PM CT
August 18th, the second day of the DNC convention, marks the 100th Anniversary of the ratification of the 19th amendment. Led by the Democratic Party of Tennessee, the state that became the 36th to ratify the amendment on that day 100 years ago, you are invited to join a multi-state celebration of this historic milestone. This two hour event will feature speakers, musical performances, and a roll call of "The Perfect 36," the states that ratified the amendment.
Purchase Tickets! [https://tndp.org/ratified/] | Facebook Event [https://www.facebook.com/events/304840810958080]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/DOODLES-FOR-DEMOCRATS-tndp-webpage-1.png]
DOODLES FOR DEMOCRATS AUCTION
How can you own a one-of-a-kind piece of art AND help to elect Democrats in Tennessee? DOODLES FOR DEMOCRATS! Artists, musicians, activists, writers, and politicians took a high quality heavyweight mixed media 6 x 8 inch artist board, picked up the artistic implement of their choice and doodled away. And the results have been outstanding. Visit the TNDP DOODLES FOR DEMOCRATS AUCTION (Live on Sunday, August 16, 2020 at 8:00 am CT). [https://tndp.org/doodles/]
VISIT THE AUCTION [https://www.betterunite.com/TNDP-tndpdoodlesfordemocrats/Auction?a=39ca3e40-18f5-4601-b47b-f22811e3bf99] | FACEBOOK [https://www.facebook.com/events/589833798588681]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/sponsors.png]
See you "at" #DemConvention.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
SUPPORT TENNSSEE CANDIDATES
The momentum built during convention is paramount and crucial to this election cycle in Tennessee as we fight to flip the state legislature. Donations made will go to direct efforts to support candidates up and down the ballot this fall. We need you in this fight alongside us. THANK YOU!
https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2]

PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.

Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

[] | Facebook Event [] [] DOODLES FOR DEMOCRATS AUCTION How can you own a one-of-a-kind piece of art AND help to elect Democrats in Tennessee? DOODLES FOR DEMOCRATS! Artists, musicians, activists, writers, and politicians took a high quality heavyweight mixed media 6 x 8 inch artist board, picked up the artistic implement of their choice and doodled away. And the results have been outstanding. Visit the TNDP DOODLES FOR DEMOCRATS AUCTION (Live on Sunday, August 16, 2020 at 8:00 am CT). [] VISIT THE AUCTION [] | FACEBOOK [] [] See you "at" #DemConvention. [] Mary Mancini Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party SUPPORT TENNSSEE CANDIDATES The momentum built during convention is paramount and crucial to this election cycle in Tennessee as we fight to flip the state legislature. Donations made will go to direct efforts to support candidates up and down the ballot this fall. We need you in this fight alongside us. THANK YOU! [] PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Fight the censorship & share videos, ideas, links & more! - Week of August 17th Action Items
body:
| |
---
This week, we are asking you to push out the ideas, videos, articles, etc. that the media and Big Tech is so intent on censoring. And, they are dedicated to censoring the information because they want to win an election. It is scandalous – people will die because they want to win an election. So, it’s up to us to push, push, push this info out.
|
---
**Watch and Share Our Video, “Ask a Medical Expert.”**
Watch and share our Facebook Live event, “Ask a Medical Expert,” from last week where we had doctors answer questions from viewers. Some of your own questions might have been asked and answered! With all of the disinformation and misinformation out there from the media and politicians, it’s vital to hear the truth from actual doctors. You do not need a Facebook account to watch the video.

**[Watch and share via this link.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjMwLWEwYjRmMjU5MzdjMjRlZTVhNzJlNWNiYjIzYmY3NDI2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvbGl2ZS1icm9hZGNhc3RzL2Fzay1hLW1lZGljYWwtZXhwZXJ0Lz9taWQ9NDI1MzkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=dJGgEYlK5DJk1zkTGPr4og)**

Note: [We also have a short, 3.5 minute clip](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjMwLWEwYjRmMjU5MzdjMjRlZTVhNzJlNWNiYjIzYmY3NDI2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvbGl2ZS1icm9hZGNhc3RzL3VucmVhc29uYWJsZS1iYWNrLXRvLXNjaG9vbC1yZXF1aXJlbWVudHMtd2lsbC1jYXVzZS11bmludGVuZGVkLWhhcm0tdG8tb3VyLWNoaWxkcmVuLz9taWQ9NDI1MzkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=mCF1EoIvfNb6P4LELfNhXg) specifically about unreasonable back to school requirements that you can watch and share.
|
---
**Sign and Share the Hydroxychloroquine Letter**
We must break through the politicization of Hydroxychloroquine! Lives are at stake, and we cannot sit by and wait any longer. If you haven’t signed the letter yet, please do so today, and if you have signed it, be sure to share it with others!
[SIGN THE LETTER](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjMwLWEwYjRmMjU5MzdjMjRlZTVhNzJlNWNiYjIzYmY3NDI2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTYzh5dlBzb0ZpV19TQUVsYnA1TnAwVE9qUUJYYVpIS0Z6dHRvVjdsLXp3cDExLXVnL3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00MjUzOSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=2b_EqAzyseTAgdyGmhswVg)
|
---
**Continue to Watch and Share Censored Videos & Ideas**
**Petition Against Big Tech Censorship**
Use this link to watch, and copy it to paste and share on social media or by email:
**[https://www.teapartypatriots.org/americas-frontline-doctors-summit/](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjMwLWEwYjRmMjU5MzdjMjRlZTVhNzJlNWNiYjIzYmY3NDI2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYW1lcmljYXMtZnJvbnRsaW5lLWRvY3RvcnMtc3VtbWl0Lz9taWQ9NDI1MzkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=kmtbjz0kNt8S7uhOeb0jyQ)**

**Second Opinion Project Interviews with Doctors**
Use this link to sign, and copy it to paste and share on social media or by email:
**[https://www.secondopinionproject.com/sign39610500](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjMwLWEwYjRmMjU5MzdjMjRlZTVhNzJlNWNiYjIzYmY3NDI2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2Vjb25kb3BpbmlvbnByb2plY3QuY29tL3NpZ24zOTYxMDUwMD9taWQ9NDI1MzkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=lCuWKvk2Y2PZwqg97kDfzQ)**
|
---
**Read and Share Links About Kids, Schools, and COVID**
Thank you to our friend Phil Kerpen of [American Commitment](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjMwLWEwYjRmMjU5MzdjMjRlZTVhNzJlNWNiYjIzYmY3NDI2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYW1lcmljYW5jb21taXRtZW50Lm9yZy8_bWlkPTQyNTM5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=7Ukv4PyTFjfMf5D1NkmZdg) and [The Committee to Unleash Prosperity](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjMwLWEwYjRmMjU5MzdjMjRlZTVhNzJlNWNiYjIzYmY3NDI2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9jb21taXR0ZWV0b3VubGVhc2hwcm9zcGVyaXR5LmNvbS8_bWlkPTQyNTM5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=BQ_FueGdggnq-WfYdxE0VA) for these links and information.

Sweden and Iceland never closed and had no issues. [And here are the opening dates of all the other countries – all doing fine.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjMwLWEwYjRmMjU5MzdjMjRlZTVhNzJlNWNiYjIzYmY3NDI2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9JbURhcnJlbkR1bm4yL3N0YXR1cy8xMjg5MDUyMDEwMTEzNzk0MDQ4P21pZD00MjUzOSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=Psp5cjBCaUG9skM8EG46Cw)

[A new document from Phil Kerpen](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjMwLWEwYjRmMjU5MzdjMjRlZTVhNzJlNWNiYjIzYmY3NDI2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2NyaWJkLmNvbS9kb2N1bWVudC80NzIyNzE3ODMvQW5zd2Vycy10by1BbnRpLVNjaG9vbGVycy1vbi1Lb3JlYS1Jc3JhZWwtQ2hpY2Fnby1hbmQtR2VvcmdpYT9taWQ9NDI1MzkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=SCEhCk61ExIUUngn1BGnrA) answering some common anti-schooler arguments.

**Two interesting European CDC reports on schools. **
[This one is on testing policy.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjMwLWEwYjRmMjU5MzdjMjRlZTVhNzJlNWNiYjIzYmY3NDI2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZWNkYy5ldXJvcGEuZXUvc2l0ZXMvZGVmYXVsdC9maWxlcy9kb2N1bWVudHMvY292aWQtMTktb2JqZWN0aXZlcy1zY2hvb2wtdGVzdGluZy5wZGY_bWlkPTQyNTM5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=H7SPidMUcQwNqrrUL8dN6Q) They DO NOT recommend quarantine or testing of healthy contacts of confirmed positives. Only alerting parents to watch for symptoms.

[This one is on transmission in schools](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjMwLWEwYjRmMjU5MzdjMjRlZTVhNzJlNWNiYjIzYmY3NDI2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZWNkYy5ldXJvcGEuZXUvc2l0ZXMvZGVmYXVsdC9maWxlcy9kb2N1bWVudHMvQ09WSUQtMTktc2Nob29scy10cmFuc21pc3Npb24tQXVndXN0JTIwMjAyMC5wZGY_bWlkPTQyNTM5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=1fNiS0ak2IVNEUID26p7gw) – they find it is very rare.
|
---
**Read and Share Links About Kids, Schools, and COVID**
Keep an eye out every week for a new activity or book or lesson to bring real civics back to our children.

This week, we will study Winston Churchill’s article, [“What Good’s a Constitution?”](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjMwLWEwYjRmMjU5MzdjMjRlZTVhNzJlNWNiYjIzYmY3NDI2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTE%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9jb25zdGl0dXRpbmdhbWVyaWNhLm9yZy93aGF0LWdvb2RzLWEtY29uc3RpdHV0aW9uLWJ5LXdpbnN0b24tY2h1cmNoaWxsLTE4NzQtMTk2NS1yZXByaW50ZWQtZnJvbS10aGUtdS1zLWNvbnN0aXR1dGlvbi1hLXJlYWRlci1wdWJsaXNoZWQtYnktaGlsbHNkYWxlLWNvbGxlZ2UvP21pZD00MjUzOSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=sOc0GU3Alyg7daohllm6fw) Read the article as a family, and then use the discussion questions to explore the article further. [From _Constituting America_](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjMwLWEwYjRmMjU5MzdjMjRlZTVhNzJlNWNiYjIzYmY3NDI2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTI%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9jb25zdGl0dXRpbmdhbWVyaWNhLm9yZy8_bWlkPTQyNTM5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=Uvwah0FGbQpPTBh8gH_sAw):

_“Written soon after Franklin Roosevelt’s Democratic Convention Address of 1936, this article by British statesman Winston Churchill points to the wide gulf between Churchill’s and Roosevelt’s economic views, even if five years later they would forge a close wartime alliance. Beyond their differences on economics, Churchill sees the American Constitution as an enduring source of strength for the American republic, not an obstacle to be overcome.”_

While Winston Churchill wasn’t American, and we are learning about American civics, his perspective and wisdom about America still offers us so much and helps us to understand the truly special nature of our founding and Constitution. In fact, Hillsdale College has “The Churchill Project,” where you can find more information about Winston Churchill and what he offers students of American civics.

**Discussion Questions**
Churchill wrote, “I take the opposite view. I hold that governments are meant to be, and must remain, the servants of the citizens.” What does this mean today, and do we still think of government as the servant of the citizens? Why or why not?

How has the pandemic changed that view?

How do the Great Depression and the pandemic downturn resemble each other in terms of government responses?

**Links**
* [Read “What Good’s a Constitution?"](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjMwLWEwYjRmMjU5MzdjMjRlZTVhNzJlNWNiYjIzYmY3NDI2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTM%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9jb25zdGl0dXRpbmdhbWVyaWNhLm9yZy93aGF0LWdvb2RzLWEtY29uc3RpdHV0aW9uLWJ5LXdpbnN0b24tY2h1cmNoaWxsLTE4NzQtMTk2NS1yZXByaW50ZWQtZnJvbS10aGUtdS1zLWNvbnN0aXR1dGlvbi1hLXJlYWRlci1wdWJsaXNoZWQtYnktaGlsbHNkYWxlLWNvbGxlZ2UvP21pZD00MjUzOSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=Irw9nrLt9Iaz4Pvc2mcOdw)
* [Hillsdale College’s “The Churchill Project.”](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjMwLWEwYjRmMjU5MzdjMjRlZTVhNzJlNWNiYjIzYmY3NDI2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93aW5zdG9uY2h1cmNoaWxsLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvP21pZD00MjUzOSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=3S9i7eR55VbLpU-2CTnMTQ)

In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin

Friend,

I’ll keep this short, but I wanted to reach out to you today to talk about what these next 78 days will mean for our campaign.

We’re in a fight to take back the House and protect America from the Left’s socialist agenda to defund our police departments, tear down statues of American heroes, and open our borders to let crime and contraband flow freely.

**They know that the House is in our reach, and they’re doing everything they can to stop us from taking it back and firing Nancy Pelosi this November.**
[**CHIP IN TO FIRE NANCY PELOSI**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=d494adb39c884881861914c881c4077c&_e=8fGJAN3DE7Uu02VRB72BSm7l2xJTnbIJECKtiWUEwZeda-O6qCoO1UwbiuwRlTaUwSSWdjzd86Vq9omzefala9xjHoU8SxhtWfORY4XeZxklh7q2LUuD6J8hXRI52JiGBhhfvePyX7dF-qrjUC9wTE0Dp8RoP_8kKXPMa-KnI4iyHtdsGN7DkUpttjxwiAycpdTzvKsvfitrFoPM4eWU5_oQVXDFwXMXYZoHxD-wy-OqmvK8OBxHSwk9E71QXdV9qcPmPgbrxl0zCjUmTTXf46RbddokqpYiksqaLNG02KUZrR5cYWKT524R2G6nQrN4y7iF9jA9HmuBOHLQrSYRdWMhk61ibrPrkeZP__1gvxY8EjbjVLyLIROIXgClSky00E-p9mneWcYAeo3eh4_lbXnLHflEt8A2YCnxg2kVY8cr0uCkgu7DBpsNjW-5iyu6ZByw1-XBfbjcIeedM0gotXIyxVlvSzbUZCeZ_fNzbRM%3D)
That’s why we need to work harder than ever over these final 11 weeks of the campaign, and we’re starting by looking for 1,000 individual donors to help us take back the House and stop the Left’s socialist agenda on Election Day.

**Friend, last I checked, we still need 684 to chip in any amount by the end of the month to help us reach our goal and get us one step closer to a Republican Congress.**

Every penny we raise makes a difference right now. Can I count on you to join me on this mission?
[**CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT TO FLIP THE HOUSE**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=d494adb39c884881861914c881c4077c&_e=8fGJAN3DE7Uu02VRB72BSm7l2xJTnbIJECKtiWUEwZeda-O6qCoO1UwbiuwRlTaUwSSWdjzd86Vq9omzefala9xjHoU8SxhtWfORY4XeZxklh7q2LUuD6J8hXRI52JiGBhhfvePyX7dF-qrjUC9wTE0Dp8RoP_8kKXPMa-KnI4iyHtdsGN7DkUpttjxwiAycpdTzvKsvfitrFoPM4eWU5_oQVXDFwXMXYZoHxD-wy-OqmvK8OBxHSwk9E71QXdV9qcPmPgbrxl0zCjUmTTXf436tvXozVngHklTTKJrrMA86tTiznc3LfKr_szGOd2gHHOVijWo9gDIP-nohYrZSiPQanA-FD86vPGu9MvsCCTzW0CU4JNOWwgpdt5VZ1sDfgAcNGM6hJzjbEpqT7sdFgDXaqz8xQCRgknMPwsmHfQ6cZKsMJNX8pq251NGUavr_nWu9rnYz7zR-mvEuhOdxHF20Azfhwk-4jBq6NZojX-0%3D)

Darin LaHood

subject: We’ll Protect America’s Suburbs
body:
The crime and chaos in Democrat-run cities have gotten so bad that liberals are even getting out of Manhattan’s Upper West Side. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=710d6c9134&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **We’ll Protect America’s Suburbs**

“The crime and chaos in Democrat-run cities have gotten so bad that liberals are even getting out of Manhattan’s Upper West Side. Rather than rethink their destructive policies, the left wants to make sure there is no escape,” President Trump and Housing & Urban Development Secretary Ben Carson write in _The Wall Street Journal_.

“A once-unthinkable agenda, a relentless push for more high-density housing in single-family residential neighborhoods, has become the mainstream goal of the left.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7bd9875ebe&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Trump warned New York City Mayor Bill de Blasio Sunday night that the federal government would act if his office fails to get a grip on the ongoing increase of violent crime in the city . . . [This weekend,] at least five people died in shootings across the city in at least 30 shootings,” Edmund DeMarche reports for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=814a3263b4&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “On Thursday, President Trump closed a historic peace deal between Israel and the United Arab Emirates . . . The agreement would not have been possible without the leadership of a president who refuses to do things the same old way just because ‘that’s how it has always been done,’” Senior Advisor Jared Kushner writes in [_The Washington Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2edb03afbe&e=3ee4985eea) _._
---
|
---
| This April, the Trump Administration “launched a historic counternarcotics operation to target drug traffickers and disrupt the flow of illicit drugs to the United States. The narco-traffickers targeted include members of the illegitimate, thuggish regime of Nicolás Maduro and the Cartel de los Soles (‘Cartel of the Suns’) in Venezuela,” National Security Advisor Robert O’Brien writes in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=423b67399f&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

Joe and Kamala need 10,000 responses from Pennsylvania to prove Trump's attacks are NOT working. **[Please confirm: Are you voting for Democrats in this historic election? ](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e7/18e32a7f/4dde17d9/7b21177a/2373855205/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Joe-Biden-Democratic-Strategy-Survey?source=20200817_em_pet_b1_jakav_30")** [**Yes!**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e7/18e32a7f/4dde17d9/7b21177a/2373855205/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Joe-Biden-Democratic-Strategy-Survey?source=20200817_em_pet_b1_jakav_30")** **[No](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e7/18e32a7f/4dde17d9/7b21177a/2373855205/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Joe-Biden-Democratic-Strategy-Survey?source=20200817_em_pet_b1_jakav_30")**** | [**NAME:**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e7/18e32a7f/4dde17d9/7b21177a/2373855205/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Joe-Biden-Democratic-Strategy-Survey?source=20200817_em_pet_b1_jakav_30")dpwillis67@gmail.com
**[CONSTITUENT ID](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e7/18e32a7f/4dde17d9/7b21177a/2373855205/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Joe-Biden-Democratic-Strategy-Survey?source=20200817_em_pet_b1_jakav_30"): **252485

* * *
This is a make-or-break moment.

SECONDS after Joe and Kamala's big announcement, Trump launched a filthy attack ad smearing her!

It's going to take a SURGE of Democratic voters to shut down Trump's attacks and prove them absolutely false.

Joe, Kamala, and Senate Democratic candidates like Ben Ray Lujan are depending on your vote to make history. [**But our records indicate your voter status is undecided!**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e7/18e32a7f/4dde17d9/7b21177a/2373855205/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Joe-Biden-Democratic-Strategy-Survey?source=20200817_em_pet_b1_jakav_30")

---

We need 10,000 responses from Pennsylvania to get an accurate sample size.

But we're sending Ben Ray these final responses tomorrow morning, so we need all confirmations in by midnight.
[**PLEASE CONFIRM: Are you voting for Democrats in this historic election?**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e7/18e32a7f/4dde17d9/7b21177a/2373855205/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Joe-Biden-Democratic-Strategy-Survey?source=20200817_em_pet_b1_jakav_30")
[**Yes!**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e7/18e32a7f/4dde17d9/7b21177a/2373855205/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Joe-Biden-Democratic-Strategy-Survey?source=20200817_em_pet_b1_jakav_30")** **[No](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e7/18e32a7f/4dde17d9/7b21177a/2373855205/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Joe-Biden-Democratic-Strategy-Survey?source=20200817_em_pet_b1_jakav_30")****

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e7/18e32a7f/4dde17d9/7b21177f/2373855205/VEsEBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e7/18e32a7f/4dde17d9/7b21177c/2373855205/VEsEBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e7/18e32a7f/4dde17d9/7b21177d/2373855205/VEsEBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e7/18e32a7f/4dde17d9/7b211779/2373855205/VEsEBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e7/18e32a7f/4dde17d9/7b21177b/2373855205/VEsEAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e7/18e32a7f/4dde17d9/7b211772/2373855205/VEsEAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: Corruption is endangering our Postal Service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Our post office is in danger.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18727057/237870247/-1161988460?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTA3MDQ4Mi1jNmUwLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mnrHbWQT1OO5h5j0GmMWWd57w-k6Vu4LiI8Z_FhXeyw=&emci=258b8c1b-bfe0-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=b1070482-c6e0-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=14145524)
---
| Friend,

Our post office is in danger.

**The Postmaster General has slashed the USPS budget, physically removed mail-sorting machines from post offices, and laid off staff.**

This has led to mail delays, mail drop-off boxes being removed from neighborhoods that need it the most, and our postal workers in danger of losing their jobs.

**And it gets worse: Trump himself admitted _on television_ that he planned on defunding the post office to make universal mail-in voting as difficult as possible.** In other words, he’s planning on permanently damaging a system we all rely on -- from senior citizens receiving medicine by mail to small businesses using the USPS for their deliveries -- in order to expand voter suppression. | [END CORRUPTION: Save the USPS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18727058/237870248/-1161988460?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTA3MDQ4Mi1jNmUwLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mnrHbWQT1OO5h5j0GmMWWd57w-k6Vu4LiI8Z_FhXeyw=&emci=258b8c1b-bfe0-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=b1070482-c6e0-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=14145524)
---

We can’t allow our right to vote safely in the middle of a pandemic to be taken away.

And we can’t allow our Constitutionally-protected postal service to fail.

Congress is reconvening this week to investigate -- and **I’m asking you to stand with me and demand that Congress protect the USPS and ensure that this kind of corruption never happens again.**

clean_body: Our post office is in danger. | Friend, Our post office is in danger. The Postmaster General has slashed the USPS budget, physically removed mail-sorting machines from post offices, and laid off staff. This has led to mail delays, mail drop-off boxes being removed from neighborhoods that need it the most, and our postal workers in danger of losing their jobs. And it gets worse: Trump himself admitted on television that he planned on defunding the post office to make universal mail-in voting as difficult as possible. In other words, he’s planning on permanently damaging a system we all rely on -- from senior citizens receiving medicine by mail to small businesses using the USPS for their deliveries -- in order to expand voter suppression. | We can’t allow our right to vote safely in the middle of a pandemic to be taken away. And we can’t allow our Constitutionally-protected postal service to fail. Congress is reconvening this week to investigate -- and I’m asking you to stand with me and demand that Congress protect the USPS and ensure that this kind of corruption never happens again. Thank you, Sri Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate.
