President Trump is coming back to Minnesota on Monday for a stop in Mankato. **We already knew that Minnesota was going to be a top pick up target for Trump, but lumping us in with visits to Wisconsin and Arizona on the same day confirms it.** We need your help: by making a contribution this weekend ahead of the visit, you will aid our ability to respond to Trump and whatever comes in his wake on Monday. name: Amy Kennedy for Congress
subject: three things
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amy Kennedy for Congress
body:

#
Folks, here are three things you need to know about this race: **First:** Last week, two polls showed Amy taking the lead for the first time in the race. One poll even had her ahead by _five points_. Remember, this is the same district that _Trump won by five points in 2016._ **Second:** The Cook Political Report moved our race from “Lean Republican” to “Toss-Up” for the first time since we kicked off our campaign. **Third:** We have less than 100 days to reach undecided voters and ensure everyone can cast their ballot safely. name: Matt Mayberry
subject: MAJOR development:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Mayberry for Congress P
body:
| Derek-
As one of my biggest supporters, I wanted to share some _INCREDIBLE_ news with you first: Former U.S. Senator John E. Sununu just endorsed my campaign for Congress -- one of nearly 600 Granite Staters who are committed to helping us fight. Senator Sununu is a committed conservative who stood strong for New Hampshire values during his time in the U.S. Senate, and that's exactly the kind of Congressman I will be for New Hampshire's First Congressional District! Not only did Senator Sununu endorse our campaign, he also made a generous contribution. [_**Join Senator Sununu and put a true New Hampshire conservative in Congress**_](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDg5ODc2NjY1MTU5OTE0NzUyJmM9ZjRlOSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zODk1NzUzOTcmZD1yM3IzZjdm.84je2PqNU8AwrwIKFPDsyPCHneoL4gFVlJkWdt3-6Iw) While my opponent's few endorsements and support are from Washington, DC and New Jersey -- and he just moved here in January – I am INCREDIBLY proud of the endorsements and dollars that matter the most: those from New Hampshire! **[_Join Senator Sununu and help us finish the next few weeks strong!_](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDg5ODc2NjY1MTU5OTE0NzUyJmM9ZjRlOSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zODk1NzU0MDAmZD1vMWI1azBv.MmxDo0N0qG16UelDR202L3acSaMRdFDe2Ux0pU9tBXs)** Please -- do whatever you can ASAP! Thank you,
Matt Mayberry
| |

_Contributions or gifts to Biden Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

The first $5,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee ("PAC") will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $2,800/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $2,800/$5,000 for the general election. For contributions made after the primary, the full amount of the contribution, up to $2,800/$5,000, will be designated for the general election. The next $35,500/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $150,000/$75,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AZ, CO, FL, GA, MI, MN, NC, NE, NH, NV, OH, PA, TX, VA, and WI. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AL, DE, KS, LA, MA, MD, MS, NJ, NY, VT, and WV. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AK, ID, IN, KY, ME, MO, MT, ND, NM, SC, and TN. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.

The allocation listed above may change if a contributor designates their contribution for a particular participant(s) or if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle._

The 2020 Democratic National Convention begins tonight... and it's going to be a doozy.

_They've brought the entire clown car for this one_. Everyone from Michelle Obama to socialist Bernie Sanders, and New York's finest governor, Andrew Cuomo, will be taking center stage.

It's no surprise that they're using the biggest "stars" of the Democratic Party to try and make the biggest splash possible, and they're going to have a record number of people watching in the virtual audience.

Beginning tonight, **the radical left's mega donors are maxing out their contributions to Biden, Kamala, and their cronies in the House and Senate**. This money will undoubtedly be funneled to D.C. Jeanne Shaheen, continuing to prop up her campaign in their quest to take control of the Senate. [Fight Back Against DNC Mega Donors](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/3eaa7cfb41d91900/40e2a46ef5676215c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, it's up to you to help.

My staff has crunched the numbers, and we need to raise $32,800 before the end of the Democratic convention if we want to hold our own against their huge influx of cash.

**[Please, consider a contribution right now to fight back against the Democrats' radical policies that will be on full display this week for the nation to see](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/3eaa7cfb41d91900/ba68eddba9cdc342c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

The Democrats may be putting on a show tonight, but I know you aren't fooled. _I'm counting on patriots like you to see through their lies and help me fund a true grassroots campaign to finally TAKE BACK New Hampshire_.
\- Corky | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/3eaa7cfb41d91900/9cb8c1b40f64e009c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/3eaa7cfb41d91900/f2a1bd0a4b671930c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

Updates from the campaign trail...

| Peter,
I said it before and I'll say it again: We are winning!
But this race is still tight, and every vote will truly matter.
Tomorrow on Election Day, we have a decision to make:
Do we want a bold conservative outsider or a career politician?
And when you look at where career politicians have gotten us, the answer is clear: Conservative outsiders get things done.
In addition to voting, there's a couple things you can do to help me win:

* Call/Text your friends and family members to tell them who to support!
* While in line at the polls, talk to those near you about why they should vote for me!
* [Share my Facebook posts with your friends!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AS6Qf8U4gHkBpqKRhaJbivlRSBoda39aFzLOqYLRkk7vH5OQ2e2C7qXBFkE-9GfZ29d7N89-YnJva1z6VM7fn5GZREH-8nwIGEedz6MRoxHvOcf5xMPYj6PEc4qm_VkUlc_nZpC0WyXu_hpET4uCQZsZdmpGw2gY&c=BASK5mKJtt28JeIXRwR5MxksVpMSfNyEYy163QBrwXDIh_DLwpH0AQ==&ch=7zazgncKaGOq1TVkSAWOUK45QvZPsMKymeuFEuVRSpC2n1iRvDYm-g==)

And when the final results roll in, putting us in the lead...
Join me at my Victory Party at the Hyatt Regency Coconut Point Resort!

name: URGENT - via Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Georgia's COVID-19 outbreak is "widespread and expanding"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
"Current mitigation efforts are not having a sufficient impact." |
---
Friend,

Georgia is not doing nearly enough to stop the spread of COVID-19.

That's not just what we think. That's what _the White House Coronavirus Task Force_ reportedly says. [](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2683/5b2c1286/3f0e7c66/25f1a2a9/1305428927/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_17_ajc_whtf?refcode=em_2020_08_17_ajc_whtf_img") **The Task Force warns Georgia will keep seeing "widespread and expanding community viral spread" without policy changes, as "current mitigation efforts are not having a sufficient impact."**

**Friend, this is what happens when Georgia's leaders like Gov. Brian Kemp and Sen. David Perdue listen to Donald Trump instead of the advice of medical experts.**

_And we only know this because the report was leaked to the Atlanta Journal-Constitution -- the White House was trying to hide this critical information from the people of Georgia._

**The government's coronavirus response has been a catastrophic failure, and it's only getting worse in Georgia. Let's vote them all out.**

**[Chip in to elect Georgia Democrat Jon Ossoff to the Senate to defeat Trump stooge David Perdue and give Democrats a Senate majority.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2683/5b2c1286/3f0e7c66/25f1a2a8/1305428927/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_17_ajc_whtf?refcode=em_2020_08_17_ajc_whtf")**

---
Friend, there are 16 states that don't have some kind of statewide mask requirement, and Georgia is one of them.

_In fact, Kemp issued emergency orders doing the opposite -- he tried to stop cities from enacting mask requirements!_

We can't just do nothing in Georgia and expect numbers to go down and people to stop getting infected.

We need real political leadership to get us out of this crisis, not the ignorance and ineptitude we are seeing from Kemp, Perdue, and Trump.

**[Jon Ossoff will put the people's health and safety first instead of cowering to an incompetent demagogue president. Make a donation right now to elect him to the Senate and usher in a new generation of leadership.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2683/5b2c1286/3f0e7c66/25f1a2a8/1305428927/VEsO/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_17_ajc_whtf?refcode=em_2020_08_17_ajc_whtf")**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: CBS New Publishes Election Results 48 Hours Early!
body:
Late last night, my phone blew up with calls and texts from voters with a story I just couldn’t believe.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-388768-916521-5147027-f9d9e95de2-f551952586)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-388768-916521-5147027-f9d9e95de2-f551952586) Late last night, my phone blew up with calls and texts from voters with a story I just couldn’t believe.

With the Primary hours away, our campaign has been contacting tens of thousands of voters to turn them out on Tuesday . . . so **I was shocked that the top local news outlet in my Congressional District ALREADY PUBLISHED THE ELECTION RESULTS!**

CBS News through their affiliate CBS 12, published an entire “election results” page with 100% of precincts reporting in over a dozen races . . . including mine.

Of course, **they had me LOSING with just 2% of the vote!**

We contacted CBS and they flat out refused to take the page down saying it was a “system test” although there was no notice on that page of the results being a test.

For their viewers who saw their fake results, they’re left wondering if they should even go out and vote on Tuesday.

Right now, I have to reach back out to the voters in my district and inform them of CBS’ voter suppression campaign, [**will you help me reach them by pitching in $10 right now**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-388768-916521-5147028-89a0fab363-f551952586).

We’ll need to contact each voter in the District and we have to do it BEFORE the polls open at 7 am in the morning.

[**Anything you can donate will be greatly appreciated.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-388768-916521-5147027-f9d9e95de2-f551952586)

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

Photo Credit: Gage Skidmore
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-388768-916521-84585d41bbe610b-f551952586)

name: Evergreen Events Team
subject: Last chance to register for our BYOB event
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Don't miss our first-ever Policy + Pints BYOB happy hour!
| Friend -- the Democratic National Convention kicks off at 9 p.m. ET / 6 p.m. PT tonight! But first, we're hosting our first-ever **Policy + Pints** BYOB happy hour tonight at 8:30 p.m. ET / 5:30 p.m. PT. We want to brief you on Joe Biden's climate plan, and you won't want to miss it. **[Join members of Team Evergreen -- including Maggie, Leah, and Julian -- as they dish on the Biden-Harris climate plan and gear up for opening night of the convention. Register now for tonight's happy hour at 8:30 p.m. ET / 5:30 p.m. PT before it's too late! (And don't forget to put your beverages -- adult or otherwise -- in the fridge now so you can stay cool~~while we talk about all this hot climate policy~~.)](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/750?t=2&akid=2237%2E53494%2Eef_y3G)** | [REGISTER ON ZOOM ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/750?t=3&akid=2237%2E53494%2Eef_y3G)
---
See you tonight,
The Evergreen Events Team
P.S. Up to 500 people can join **Policy + Pints** directly on Zoom! We've seen a huge amount of interest, so if you can't watch on Zoom, be sure to tune in as we **[go live on our Facebook page](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/336?t=4&akid=2237%2E53494%2Eef_y3G)** , too.
\---- Forwarded message ----
From: Maggie Thomas, Evergreen Action
Date: Fri, Aug 14, 2020
Subject: What's in the Biden climate plan? We'll tell you:
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=5&akid=2237%2E53494%2Eef_y3G)
Friend,
The Democratic National Convention kicks off Monday!
To get in the party spirit, I'll be hosting a live, opening-night happy hour with two ~~fellow nerds~~ very special guests. We're calling it **Policy + Pints** \-- and you're invited to our EXCLUSIVE1 live pre-DNC briefing on Joe Biden's climate plan (but with beverages, obviously).
**[Will you join us on Monday, August 17 at 8:30 p.m. ET / 5:30 p.m. PT?](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/750?t=6&akid=2237%2E53494%2Eef_y3G)**
[REGISTER ON ZOOM ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/750?t=7&akid=2237%2E53494%2Eef_y3G)
---
Think of **Policy + Pints** as a virtual BYOB2 happy hour with me, Leah Stokes, Julian Brave NoiseCat, and climate activists from all over the country. Leah and Julian are two of Evergreen's advisory board members, and they know more about climate policy and activism than just about anyone. (In fact, you've probably seen their names in your inbox. See, it's like you're already friends!)
**[Join us Monday, August 17 at 8:30 p.m. ET / 5:30 p.m. PT as we crack open a beer (or whatever's your beverage of choice!), look under the hood of the Biden-Harris climate plan (from policy experts who advised on it), and share our hopes for the convention.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/750?t=8&akid=2237%2E53494%2Eef_y3G)**
We'll wrap up by 9 p.m. ET / 6 p.m. PT so we can all catch the convention's opening speeches, including remarks from Former First Lady Michelle Obama and Senator Bernie Sanders.
Monday's event won't be the only **Policy + Pints** night, but it will be the first3 \-- and ~~it might get a little weird~~ it will definitely go off without a hitch.
Hope to see you there!
Maggie Thomas
Political Director, Evergreen Action
[REGISTER ON ZOOM ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/750?t=9&akid=2237%2E53494%2Eef_y3G)
---
1 Disclaimer: Actually not exclusive at all. Please forward this invite to any friends and family!
2 Bring your own beer, bring your own red carpet, bring your own press badge...
3 After all, you only get to live out your fantasy of attending an official, exclusive pre-convention virtual happy hour once in your life!
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=2237%2E53494%2Eef_y3G). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Christianna=20Dyer?=
subject: Your weekly #TeamDani update!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1dafda8625a7/your-weekly-teamdani-update?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Hello, Team Dani! Hope you all are getting ready for this week! There's a lot of exciting events on the calendar: This weekend we’re having our **WEEKEND OF ACTION** on Friday (8/21), Saturday (8/22) and Sunday (8/23)! **Sign up here:**[https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScqPvlL4xyCeQZix7KOEbuiAzIrruSHPCclQKv1yACYagfw9Q/viewform?vc=0&c=0&w=1&flr=0](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=01c142974d&e=140a9b81e7) **UPDATES: **
* We’re **78%** towards reaching our goal of filling Soldier Field with voters we called by the end of the summer!
* You contacted **3,135** people on the phone this past week!!!

* **MVP of the week award goes to:** Josh F. who made **805** of those calls!
* Let’s push through this weekend of action and make our goal a reality!!!

Some things to stay tuned for...:
* This week we’re continuing **LIT DROPS** throughout the district on Saturday 10-1 and 1-4 and Sunday 1-4 shifts. Additional times available!! Contact Marguerite ([Marguerite@daniforillinois.com](mailto:Marguerite@daniforillinois.com)) for more information and to get your shift set up!
* A “Lit drop” is when we take our literature (fliers, etc.) to a door and drop it off at the house. It’s safer than door-to-door canvassing, because we won’t be trying to speak with any voters at the door. **We’ll provide masks and gloves for anyone interested! **

A few standing reminders:
* **ITS SUMMER & ITS TIME TO PARTY!:** If you are interested in hosting a **Virtual House Party** for Dani, reach out to Marguerite at [marguerite@daniforillinois.com](mailto:marguerite@daniforillinois.com). We will walk you through it, and all you need to do is sit back with your happy hour drink of choice and invite your friends to do the same!
* While you’re still on the phone finishing phone banking, **CALL YOUR FRIENDS!** Everyone in your social circles has the potential to be an activist and volunteer right alongside you - you never know unless you ask!
* Want to be featured as a Volunteer Voice columnist? If you have helpful tips on effective outreach, send them my way!

**Volunteer Voice! ** The guest columnist this week is... Haley M. _Sometimes people can be really terrible on the phone. I do my best not to let it get to me. It’s rarely personal - they’re just angry someone is calling them. I just thank them and move on. If I need to, I take a break, grab some water, and come back for a fresh start. If they’re angry at you for supporting a good candidate, then let them be angry. You have more meaningful work to do elsewhere._
Christianna Dyer
Digital Organizer, Team Dani
---

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Add your name to demand that Trump and DeJoy stop meddling with the USPS in order to influence the election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
Today, I sued President Trump and Postmaster General DeJoy for violating the Constitution by undermining the United States Postal Service. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDu-vwqLvT_zFVnml_X30AvrftkqHK3yyebzW3ytf2eJnVa6gaCn5Cmq6hoFaiqkikvcNxWNgeyKTt-z7WFoJ2D5iqHF3aAqGyktrp2mmImik7fpsbQxjhg6dTOvL7WcI0jyQSYOujZA0V0h4pVCCqUMRSHiVL4RqPt2iT98PFx7NRdQ3Me205DmE3Oud7RTeIXKnutuhqOMEbby7jdMtGNbAGMs076bGjw9y2Vp81Ku-2opo5uSECCd2apWvoJz44HFdPKtuDLMyGn4xQ5OOFPMHR14Ahm9935m1XQEeGkGO5j975NQaCgr2pp6f4au1oMdZNyrYo0namKgZC_tAkZQ3julAz8h_eJLuGnC7pw6P2pVhU51fVoJXn8oj0uf0iaejwT8X03ksQcOM1ajn5PJqYZxWkgF6h7CfnswyQNJpZ6Ni1iDNYwsEmpMn2QKS1wApdKHrwCCRsZwYPXi7Xc5fzaxWvgDXayEEbrWCBdZ2-iDo7skp2GRlCC57GdoqHtL1z0YrHkDicxWezeXj1Sm8nH3EnHI1K95lnfIV0U59Hw1UZbcC-qfVGeo2ErHpAYxQuwSbADA6pADi3VHFUR4A/34e/4lRDeHcpQGmguRz3nEC6og/h0/DY2A_mx4mq15GB3VD3sgfug8nUNuzZcbtD0YWbA8l3g) , **Today, I sued President Trump and Postmaster General DeJoy for violating the Constitution by undermining the United States Postal Service.** Trump and DeJoy have been deliberately reducing the USPS’ letter-carrying capacity by ripping out postal boxes, taking away mail-sorting machines, instituting a hiring freeze, and ending overtime pay. Trump explicitly said that he is withholding USPS funding to make it harder to vote by mail, because he knows that greater voter participation will favor Democrats. **[What Trump is doing is blatantly unconstitutional. Add your name to our petition to say you support our lawsuit and demand that Trump and DeJoy stop meddling with the USPS in order to influence the election.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDu-vwqLvT_zFVnml_X30AvrftkqHK3yyebzW3ytf2eJnVa6gaCn5Cmq6hoFaiqkikvcNxWNgeyKTt-z7WFoJ2D5iqHF3aAqGyktrp2mmImik7fpsbQxjhg6dTOvL7WcI0jyQSYOujZA0V0h4pVCCqUMRSHiVL4RqPt2iT98PFx7NRdQ3Me205DmE3Oud7RTeIXerLpPESCiaym69ShnVmGbirPUpWlgFKnfMRgl3whsDqOlQnNGobI9QPuBMPk9KIUXsx-s6NVv1tC7cydGMl1Vng89kLVI11b-5dm6YwCy_h8uxIAyzq07Ba8SvHiGRR-O-sBVvMr0adjWOmFUm5yFhJTwULdAwtqWN2bw2CIqaMNs-NfhmWFdYuV8Z2z98KlLEsUVOuGKSF3X8zkh-0ocHkWBe4YeXXl0ahJ7Tz3mTgjx1A9G9QkzJwF8slmS0VnJHOUVa9Z4SzfLXQDBCj2Gwmpv2uqnr4xJHVzprNvuuMaIQiwZvrfdsycuNrjsTmsPqOFRzf3aTRW08jnrdT4tcpyumg8alQMvgewQSeiQh5gKTsb3CAN-03NF48dLl0rxbst7VRFK6224Iz2ewhJGQ/34e/4lRDeHcpQGmguRz3nEC6og/h1/or8Dzi6eCQ-jvU_ZQnEZEjhs8oiKIhfflKWOmyufZKY)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDu-vwqLvT_zFVnml_X30AvrftkqHK3yyebzW3ytf2eJnVa6gaCn5Cmq6hoFaiqkikvcNxWNgeyKTt-z7WFoJ2D5iqHF3aAqGyktrp2mmImik7fpsbQxjhg6dTOvL7WcI0jyQSYOujZA0V0h4pVCCqUMRSHiVL4RqPt2iT98PFx7NRdQ3Me205DmE3Oud7RTeIX0fePInFwp93OdNAy7Xvwce3fwLrPIFrLGZstFyZ6zGSTDmtsbTB4igZbbWxc757-tYrLc_fFT4YymmmNijghPf7MhEHXOrP20e4AzBgxBuwZ6seMKjM7BJX0oF5Z5LT8MBDf1ULe2hQFV4P8iubUatnhn1Vuj7RI43L8Si6txpSTF8pPRmSQvYrt3QLRCCUmmQacOIscRAiL-r3olmj-o8Ahv2oN-HspPrzUzotXwRt0K8OaH17R1iKpnlzvmYVNKIQFv5C-W9Pfhs3IvTIeM4a_DWjG6u25IzbW5xyR1UKE8bs07jO1snYozi6H0CnYE--F6WynKyD68HvX652USDYgS_0GYCnfcqYc5Jh2w7U_k6l0w0iUd_wxJfI-kVyIcd4BeibO0nRUSqj4G-Jmaw/34e/4lRDeHcpQGmguRz3nEC6og/h2/Q8SL5LP0ze7jpdpYze1lho-QknbP3kkFs3GZhDZaM9I) Our lawsuit seeks an injunction to right this wrong before the General Election. We are demanding that the USPS remain fully funded and that all the damage already done is reversed as soon as possible. There are reports that some postal boxes have been destroyed already, so time is of the essence if we’re going to restore the USPS before voters start sending in their ballots. I will not stand idly by while Trump interferes in our electoral process. This isn’t just an attack against the fabric of our democracy. Peter -- tonight is the first night of the Democratic Convention and we couldn't be more THRILLED!!
We've got a GREAT line-up of inspiring Democrats set to take the virtual "stage", rally the Party, and unite us to win in November!
**That 's why we're excited to invite you to represent Pennsylvania by participating in our [Exclusive Pre-Convention Survey.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0316/72412298/48960f7c/610623e1/512165758/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/exclusive-pre-convention-survey2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Exclusive+PreConvention+Survey&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200817_PreConvention_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200817_PreConvention_U2_X2")**
You're a part of a group of 5,000 hand-picked Democrats we're asking to participate today to inform our strategies going forward. _But, please don 't hesitate -- to be included in our tabulated results you must respond to this invitation by 9PM ET._
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0316/72412298/48960f7c/610623e0/512165758/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/exclusive-pre-convention-survey2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+TAKE+THE+SURVEY&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200817_PreConvention_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200817_PreConvention_U2_X2")

name: James Taylor
subject: Join me and some special guests
body:
I'm looking forward to sharing with you all what this election, and what being an active part in our country's democracy, means to me. |
---
| [](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020-grassrootsfest?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.17_B3_grassrootsfest_X__F1_S2_C1__full_t1&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.17_B3_grassrootsfest_X__F1_S2_C1__full_t1")
---
Peter --

Tonight, Democrats across the country gather for the first night of the Democratic National Convention.

We come together united, as Democrats and as Americans, for the most important election of our lifetimes. My wife, Kim, and I are doing everything in our power to help elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, and I hope you will join us, Peter.

[**That 's why I am honored to be a part of Grassroots Fest.**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020-grassrootsfest?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.17_B3_grassrootsfest_X__F1_S2_C1__full_t1&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.17_B3_grassrootsfest_X__F1_S2_C1__full_t1")

**Across the next four days, join the Biden Victory Fund and Democrats across the country for events with your Democratic ticket, their families, and a few special guests. Chip in $25 or more to access every event in Grassroots Fest, or pick out tickets to buy individually here:**
**GRASSROOTS FEST**
**Tuesday, August 18:** Joe Biden and Tom Hanks
**Thursday, August 20:** Doug Emhoff and James Taylor
**Friday, August 21:** Joe Biden, Jill Biden, Kamala Harris, and Doug Emhoff
---

[BUY TICKETS](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020-grassrootsfest?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.17_B3_grassrootsfest_X__F1_S2_C1__full_t1&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.17_B3_grassrootsfest_X__F1_S2_C1__full_t1")
---
I'm looking forward to sharing with you all what this election, and what being an active part in our country's democracy, means to me.

And this year we have a ticket we can truly be excited about. Joe Biden is a kind and decent man who understands the concept of public service. He and his wife Jill will bring strong values and compassion back to the White House.

And with Kamala Harris we have a historic candidacy and a fierce champion for families everywhere. I can't wait to sit down with her husband, Doug, and talk about the huge opportunity we have to send these two proven fighters for the people to the White House.

Peter, I hope you'll join us and come to a few, or all, of these events.

We need you, all of you, staying engaged and powering this campaign -- with your donations, with your commitment, and with your belief in what we can do together as a party and as a nation.

**Click below to get your tickets and thanks in advance for your donations. This campaign truly would not be possible without your support.**
[BUY TICKETS](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020-grassrootsfest?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.17_B3_grassrootsfest_X__F1_S2_C1__full_t1&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.17_B3_grassrootsfest_X__F1_S2_C1__full_t1")
---
All my best,

James Taylor

_James Taylor is a multiple Grammy award-winning singer and songwriter. He has been inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame and Songwriters Hall of Fame and is the recipient of the National Medal of Arts and the Presidential Medal of Freedom. James Taylor supports Joe Biden for President._
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b420/1cd0ac28/166e930dd/357e6753/3082711440/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b420/1cd0ac28/166e930dd/357e6752/3082711440/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b420/1cd0ac28/166e930dd/357e6751/3082711440/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b420/1cd0ac28/166e930dd/357e6750/3082711440/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b420/1cd0ac28/166e930dd/357e674f/3082711440/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-info-bvf"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b420/1cd0ac28/166e930dd/357e674e/3082711440/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and the Democrats.

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b420/1cd0ac28/166e930dd/357e674d/3082711440/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf-homepage&refcode=VF_EM_FR_2020.06.16_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer?amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b420/1cd0ac28/166e930dd/357e674e/3082711440/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- Biden Victory Fund
Paid for by Biden Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Biden for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AZ, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, PA, SC, TN, TX, VA, VT, WI, AND WV.
_Contributions or gifts to Biden Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

The first $5,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee ("PAC") will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $2,800/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $2,800/$5,000 for the general election. For contributions made after the primary, the full amount of the contribution, up to $2,800/$5,000, will be designated for the general election. The next $35,500/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $150,000/$75,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AZ, CO, FL, GA, MI, MN, NC, NE, NH, NV, OH, PA, TX, VA, and WI. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AL, DE, KS, LA, MA, MD, MS, NJ, NY, VT, and WV. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AK, ID, IN, KY, ME, MO, MT, ND, NM, SC, and TN. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.

The allocation listed above may change if a contributor designates their contribution for a particular participant(s) or if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle._

name: Team Warner
subject: Mark Warner and Tim Kaine virtual event
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

Senators Mark Warner and Tim Kaine are teaming up for a virtual town hall event **this Wednesday, August 19th** to share updates about their work in the Senate and answer your questions about coronavirus relief and other issues facing Virginians. All are welcome to join! Here are the details: | **Facebook Live Town Hall with Senators Mark Warner and Tim Kaine**
Wednesday, August 19th, 2020
5:00 PM ET
**[Click here to RSVP](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db54/53d9897e/54354deb/1c882ec2/385390623/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.mobilize.us/vavictory/event/305835/")**
---
Senators Mark Warner and Tim Kaine are looking forward to answering your questions about their legislative priorities and the issues affecting you and your loved ones.

Although this event is hosted on Facebook, you do **not** need a Facebook account to access the town hall. If you already have a question for Mark Warner or Tim Kaine, you can respond directly to this email, or submit your question through Facebook during the event. They will get to as many questions as they can during the event.

We hope you'll join us! **[Click here to sign up.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db54/53d9897e/54354deb/1c882ec2/385390623/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.mobilize.us/vavictory/event/305835/")**

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner

subject: FW: Calling all GOP supporters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
Amid all that’s going on, I thought I’d touch base with you, personally, to see where you’re at on things... With the radical left more aggressive tha Peter, I’m a little concerned that I haven’t received a response from you, Peter.
I know you receive quite a bit of email, and maybe I sent my previous message at a bad time...
**So I wanted to give you another chance to respond. I really need to hear from you, Peter.**
I’m reaching out to you to make sure that you’re still in this fight with me.
That you’re ready to defend Ohio from the Far-Left. That you’re ready to fight to keep the GOP Senate majority and continue cutting taxes and confirming conservative judges.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The fastest economic recovery in U.S. history
body:
Under President Trump, America built the strongest economy the world has ever seen. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=31c017a3cc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • August 17, 2020
---
| | |
# **The fastest economic recovery in U.S. history**

**Under President Trump,** America built the strongest economy the world has ever seen. The stock market broke records, the unemployment rate dropped to its lowest level in half a century, and income inequality fell as blue-collar jobs returned to our country.

**Then, as a pandemic** from China spread across the globe, President Trump made the difficult but necessary decision to shut the economy down to slow the spread of COVID-19.

🎬 [**President Trump: We are witnessing the fastest recovery in history!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d0aecfabec&e=3ee4985eea)

**Now, as we safely reopen,** our economy is surging back faster than anyone predicted:
* **America added** over 9 million jobs from May through July—beating market expectations three months in a row _._ President Trump’s historic, bipartisan relief package alone is estimated to have saved over 50 million jobs.

* **Retail spending** has fully recovered and is now at an all-time high.

* **Industrial production** rose for the third straight month in July, with factory output up 3.4 percent last month after a 5.7 percent surge in June.

* **The NASDAQ** and S&P 500 stock indices are trading at or near record highs once again, lifting Americans’ 401(k)s.

**That result** is no accident. After the financial crisis more than a decade ago, it took America over _four years_ to regain 9 million lost jobs. But following the Coronavirus shutdown, it took the Trump Economy only a few months to do just that.

**“We had such a strong** foundation that we’re recovering much faster than anybody anticipated,” President Trump said at a news conference on Saturday.

**In addition to** pro-growth, pro-worker policies long before the crisis—including tax cuts, deregulation, renegotiated trade deals, and more—President Trump responded to the pandemic by using the Defense Production Act to lead the greatest mobilization of American industry since World War II.

**The Trump Administration** has exercised the DPA and related authorities [**78 times so far**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=32481c3211&e=3ee4985eea), dispersing over $3.5 billion to speed the development and manufacture of essential materials here at home. President Trump mobilized the productive power of General Motors, for example, to create thousands of ventilators for Coronavirus patients.

**As a result, GM** repurposed its Kokomo, Indiana, plant in just 17 days. It has now produced over 21,000 ventilators.

**Other companies,** including Ford Motor Company, GE, 3M, and Puritan Medical have partnered with the Federal Government to ramp up production of everything from N-95 masks to testing swabs. This nationwide effort is boosting American manufacturing, creating jobs, reshoring supply chains, and replenishing our Strategic National Stockpile.

**“New factories,** businesses, and laboratories are being built all over America to match our Nation’s demand for personal protective equipment, pharmaceuticals, drugs, testing supplies, therapeutics, and vaccines,” President Trump said.

**President Trump’s “Made-in-America” strategy** is crucial for defeating this virus, important for restarting our economy—and essential for restoring our country’s promise.

🎬 [**President Trump: An incredible comeback is underway!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0f80c75d81&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE** : [**We have rebuilt America’s Strategic National Stockpile**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=945db3dc18&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump departs from the South Lawn** |** ** August 17, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=db5f350eeb&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f9639ea96a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=698d0cc892)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e803/77d4c309/21768db1/2636026a/3822442115/VEsHAw/?g= "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e803/77d4c309/21768db1/26360215/3822442115/VEsHAg/?g= "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

subject: Crazy Bernie OWNS Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
Peter, Crazy Bernie Sanders is in total control of the Democrat party. The same man who praises murderous dictators and openly embraces socialism is kicking off the Democratic National Convention.
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyMjMyNDkS1&kn=16&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTQxMzMyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

It's official.

Crazy Bernie Sanders is in **total control** of the Democrat party. The same man who praises murderous dictators and openly embraces socialism is _kicking off the Democratic National Convention.___

And it's time we let the American people know just how extreme the Democrats have become so we can keep them from taking power. **Instead of cowering in fear, I 'm fighting back and I need your help****. ******

Bernie isn't just speaking at their convention--_he actually wrote Joe Biden 's platform._

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyMjMyNDkS1&kn=14&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTQxMzMyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

That's right: If we let Bernie and Biden win in November, they will shove socialism down our throats. That means higher taxes, defunding the police, free healthcare for illegal immigrants, abortion on demand, the job-killing Green New Deal, and chaos in the streets.
_****_

[Stop Bernie >>> Donate Now](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyMjMyNDkS1&kn=7&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTQxMzMyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

---
****

Voters need to know that Joe Biden is a puppet of Bernie Sanders and if he wins in November, socialism and chaos will come to _every town and city across our country._

We know that Joe Biden's cronies in the mainstream media will do all they can to cover for him and attack President Trump.

That's why we have to take our message directly to the voters and make sure every American knows that **a vote for Biden is a vote for Bernie.**

[**I need you to chip in $5, $10, $25 or even $50 to help Stop the Bernie/Biden team in November**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyMjMyNDkS1&kn=19&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTQxMzMyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0).

name: Jon Ossoff (personal)
subject: Together, we can save the Post Office
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Trump is attacking our democracy. |
---
Friend,

What we're seeing right now from Donald Trump is one of the most disgusting efforts to undermine American democracy in modern history.

**President Trump is trying to deny funding for the United States Postal Service --_explicitly and openly to interfere with voting by mail_. The President wants to obstruct the electoral process because he believes he will lose a free and fair election.**

_It's beyond outrageous, friend. It's something a despot would do._

**And for Sen. David Perdue to say nothing while the President tries to undermine the integrity of our election is stunning.**

By refusing to stand up to Trump, Perdue is showing he has no spine and no principles. He is cowering in silence on his private island.

**We need to build public pressure to call out Trump's attack on our democracy and to protect our election integrity.[Right now, please join me in raising your voice to stop Trump's efforts to deny the Postal Service vital funds and join me in demanding Congress intervene to save it.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2699/5b2c1286/3f36ccd0/25f1ad42/46222223/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/s/fund-usps")**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2699/5b2c1286/3f36ccd0/25f1ad42/46222223/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/s/fund-usps")
---
Friend, Trump hand-picked one of his top campaign donors, Louis DeJoy, to be Postmaster General -- exactly the kind of patronage appointments that corrupt the federal government by packing senior leadership roles with mega-donors instead of qualified professionals.

**We can't let Trump and the GOP mega-donor who runs the Postal Service undermine the integrity of this election.**

And friend, the answer isn't to panic: It's to VOTE IN OVERWHELMING NUMBERS.

Make a plan to vote early in person or request those absentee ballots EARLY. We can't allow Trump, Perdue, and DeJoy to deter us from participating in democracy.

**[So, Friend, please take a moment today to sign my petition demanding the federal government fully fund the Postal Service.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2699/5b2c1286/3f36ccd0/25f1ad42/46222223/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/s/fund-usps")**

| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2699/5b2c1286/3f36ccd0/25f1ad42/46222223/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/s/fund-usps")
---
With love,

Jon
